description: Address 6 issues from the semantic review: fix dead secondary admission, remove redundant structural_only scoring branch, add contract_heavy test, fix retriever per-family cap for secondary families, add ablation runner _set_selectivity test, and fix pyproject.toml build backend.
steps: Step 1: Set synthesis max_active=2 in DEFAULT_FAMILY_SELECTIVITY so semantic_balanced secondary admission is reachable
Step 2: Remove redundant structural_only scoring branch and add comment explaining differentiation is only in fallback
Step 4: Fix retriever per-family cap to use max of all candidate families' max_active values
Step 6: Change pyproject.toml build-backend to setuptools.build_meta
acceptance_criteria: structural_only scoring branch removed, comment explains fallback is the differentiator
retriever uses max of all candidate families' max_active, not just primary
findings: All 6 review issues addressed. Tests pass (13 total). Eval runners produce correct results. synthesis_top2 now uses the default max_active=2 which matches current_default config (no behavioral difference in eval results since no second concept is competitive). Retriever cap fix ensures secondary-family concepts are preserved.
